chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا إِمَامٌ مِنَ الْأَئِمَّةِ ( عليهم السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 92 – The Imam<sup>asws</sup> is such that none can wash him<sup>asws</sup> (funeral wash) except an Imam<sup>asws</sup> from the Imams<sup>asws</sup>

text: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ الْإِمَامَ لَا يَغْسِلُهُ إِلَّا الْإِمَامُ فَقَالَ أَ مَا تَدْرُونَ مَنْ حَضَرَ لِغُسْلِهِ قَدْ حَضَرَهُ خَيْرٌ مِمَّنْ غَابَ عَنْهُ الَّذِينَ حَضَرُوا يُوسُفَ فِي الْجُبِّ حِينَ غَابَ عَنْهُ أَبَوَاهُ وَ أَهْلُ بَيْتِهِ .

en.hubeali: And from him, from Moalla Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Jamhour, from Yunus, from Talha who said,

‘I said to Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, ‘The Imam<sup>asws</sup> is such that none can wash him<sup>asws</sup> (for funeral) except (another) Imam<sup>asws</sup>?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘What would make you know who was present for his<sup>asws</sup> washing? (The ones who) had attended it were better than those who were absent from it. Those who attended Yusuf<sup>as</sup> in the well when his<sup>as</sup> parents and his<sup>as</sup> family were absent from him<sup>as</sup>’.
